roles.select_role: Select a role to manage its permissions
roles.name_hint: Will be converted to uppercase (e.g. TREASURER)

role_templates.select_template: Select a template to manage permissions
role_templates.error_loading: Failed to load role template data

settings.title: Settings
settings.app_name_description: The name displayed in the sidebar, login page, and browser tab.
settings.app_base_url_description: The base URL of the application, used in emails for links (e.g. password reset, welcome emails).
settings.app_base_domain_description: The root domain used for subdomain routing (e.g. memflox.com for auth.memflox.com and admin.memflox.com).
settings.date_format_description: The format used to display dates throughout the application.
settings.superadmin_subdomain_description: The subdomain used to access the super admin dashboard (e.g. "admin" → admin.lvh.me). Changes take effect on next login.
settings.minio_description: Configure MinIO (S3-compatible) storage for document uploads.
settings.minio_use_ssl_description: Enable if your MinIO endpoint uses HTTPS.
settings.tenant_editable_tooltip: Allow tenants to update this field
settings.tenant_editable_unsaved: You have unsaved tenant permission changes
settings.billing_scheduler_description: Configure when invoices are automatically generated and subscription statuses are updated.
settings.billing_scheduler_enabled_description: When enabled, invoices are generated and statuses updated according to the schedule below.
settings.billing_scheduler_cron_description: Standard 6-field Spring cron expression (seconds minutes hours day-of-month month day-of-week).

tenant_settings.title: Organization Settings
tenant_settings.no_fields: No settings are available for your organization to edit.
tenant_settings.registration_link_description: Share this link with prospective members so they can submit a membership application. Once submitted, you can review and approve requests from the Member Requests page.
tenant_settings.terms_description: Publish versioned membership terms for your organization. Members will be asked to accept the latest version when they sign up.
tenant_settings.terms_form_content_placeholder: Write the terms members need to accept. You can use placeholders from the list below.
tenant_settings.terms_placeholders_hint: Use placeholders to inject organization details automatically.
tenant_settings.terms_placeholder_insert_hint: Click a placeholder to insert at the cursor, type {{ to search placeholders, or press Ctrl+Space.
tenant_settings.terms_enable_hint: When enabled, applicants must accept terms before submitting a membership application.
tenant_settings.terms_disabled_hint: Enable Terms & Conditions above to require applicants to accept terms during registration.
tenant_settings.terms_empty: No membership terms have been published yet.
tenant_settings.terms_default_intro: By submitting this membership application to {{organization.name}}, you confirm that the information provided is complete and accurate.
tenant_settings.terms_default_body_1: If your application is approved, you agree to respect the rules, values, and decisions of {{organization.name}} and to keep your contact information up to date.
tenant_settings.terms_default_contact: For questions about these terms, please contact {{organization.name}} via {{organization.phone}} or {{organization.email}}.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: View your current plan and entitlements
subscription.contact_admin: Contact your administrator to set up a subscription plan.
subscription.confirm_status_change: Are you sure you want to change the status to {{status}}?
subscription.billing_enabled_help: When disabled, tenants on this plan will not be invoiced and will have unrestricted access without payment.

subscription_enforcement.past_due_message: Your subscription payment is overdue. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
subscription_enforcement.grace_message: Your subscription payment is due soon. Please complete payment to avoid service restrictions.
subscription_enforcement.read_only_message: Your subscription is overdue. Only read access is available until payment is received.
subscription_enforcement.locked_message: Your account has been locked due to unpaid subscription. Please make a payment to restore access.
subscription_enforcement.inactive_message: Your organization's subscription has expired or been canceled. Please reactivate your subscription to continue using the application.

billing.invoices_subtitle: View and manage your subscription invoices
billing.delete_invoice_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete invoice #{{id}}? This action cannot be undone.

plan.feature_not_available: This feature is not available on your current plan.
plan.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade your plan to access this feature.
plan.limit_reached: You have reached the limit for this feature on your current plan.
plan.member_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of members ({{limit}}) allowed on your current plan.
plan.user_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of admin users ({{limit}}) allowed on your current plan.

distribution.title: Events
distribution.subtitle: Create and manage events for your organization
distribution.set_capacity_first: Set the non-member capacity in event settings before registering
distribution.set_parcels_first: Define parcel categories before registering non-members
distribution.set_allocation_first: Configure non-member allocation in the Config tab first
distribution.non_member_allocation_desc: Set how many parcels from each category are allocated for non-members
distribution.config_no_categories: Define parcel categories first before configuring non-member allocation
distribution.allocation_explanation: {{count}} parcels allocated for non-members — max {{count}} registrations at 1 parcel per person
distribution.no_events_description: Create your first event to get started.
distribution.confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this event? This will permanently remove all associated data including categories, registrations, and distributions.
distribution.reports_download_desc: Export event data as Excel or PDF files
distribution.no_matching_distributions: No distributions match the selected filters
distribution.no_matching_registrations: No registrations match the selected filters
distribution.confirm_activate_message: Are you sure you want to activate this event? This will allow distribution to begin.
distribution.confirm_close_message: Are you sure you want to close this event? No more distributions can be made after closing.
distribution.queue_empty_desc: Press Start Distribution to load all registered recipients into the queue.
distribution.no_parcels_left: No parcels remaining in any category.
distribution.all_done_desc: All recipients in the queue have been processed.
distribution.group_done_desc: All recipients in this group have been processed.
distribution.skipped_remaining_desc: Click Distribute Now to process a skipped recipient.
distribution.activate_to_distribute: Event must be active to distribute parcels.
distribution.select_at_least_one: Select at least one parcel category to distribute.

register_member.title: Membership Application
register_member.subtitle: Fill in your details to apply for membership. An administrator will review your application.
register_member.terms_accept_label: I have read and accept version {{version}} of the membership terms and conditions.
register_member.terms_required: You must accept the latest membership terms before submitting your application.
register_member.success_message: Thank you for applying. You will receive an email once your application has been reviewed.
register_member.error_email_pending: A registration request with this email already exists for this organization.
register_member.error_email_registered: This email is already registered in this organization.
register_member.error_org_not_found: Organization not found for this registration link.
register_member.error: Failed to submit your application. Please try again.

complete_registration.title: Complete Your Registration
complete_registration.name: Name
complete_registration.set_password_instruction: Your application has been approved! Please choose a password to activate your account.

complete_registration.no_token: No activation token found in the URL. Please check your email.
complete_registration.invalid_token: This activation link is invalid or has expired. Please contact an administrator.
complete_registration.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
complete_registration.error: Failed to activate your account. The link may have expired.

member_requests.title: Member Requests
member_requests.subtitle: Review and approve or reject membership applications.
member_requests.approve_confirm_message: This will approve the application and send the applicant an email to complete their registration.
member_requests.reject_confirm_message: The applicant will be notified by email. You may optionally provide a reason.
member_requests.approved_success: Application approved. An email has been sent to the applicant.
member_requests.approve_error: Failed to approve the application. Please try again.
member_requests.reject_error: Failed to reject the application. Please try again.

member_requests.delete_error: Failed to delete the membership request. Please try again.
member_requests.empty: No requests found for this status.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Messages between you and other users.
inbox.send_error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
inbox.select_conversation: Select a conversation to view messages
inbox.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? All messages in this thread will be permanently removed.
inbox.batch_delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} conversations? All messages in these threads will be permanently removed.
